connectorUiConfig.title: Panorays
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The Panorays data connector allows ingesting company findings from the Panorays API into Microsoft Sentinel.

sampleQueries.description: Get Sample of Panorays Company Findings

dataTypes.name: PanoraysCompanyFindingPOC_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery: PanoraysCompanyFindingPOC_CL | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated) | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write required for workspace in resource group [parameters('resourceGroupName')] within subscription [parameters('subscription')]. Data ingestion requires a valid API Token: [parameters('apitoken')] for endpoint [parameters('panoraysAPIBaseUrl')].

parameters.content: #### Configuration steps for the Panorays API

parameters.label: API Token
parameters.name: apitoken
parameters.toolTip: The API Token provided by Panorays to authenticate the connector.
